ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic marker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic marker */,
  "chromosome_number" INTEGER /* Chromosome number where the marker is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the marker on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the marker on the chromosome */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., SNP, INDEL) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the marker */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the marker was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the population */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the population */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the population */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the population */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the population */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the population was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_markers" (
  "population_marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population-marker association */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the genetic marker in the population */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the association */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio of the association */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_markers_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_markers_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the genetic marker in the population */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the genetic marker in the population */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the association */,
  "test_statistic" REAL /* Test statistic of the association */,
  "degrees_of_freedom" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data that was accessed (e.g., genetic marker, population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., statistical analysis, data summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic marker */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("marker_id") REFERENCES genetic_markers ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)
